transport.agent_quote: Once helped a rioter file 6 refund claims during a single delayed journey. They made £47 before reaching Birmingham.
transport.agent_bio: Tracks cancellation patterns, handles refund paperwork, reviews every suggested action, and puts together evidence for regulator submissions. Crunches the numbers so rioters can focus on what matters.
transport.human_quote: My favourite Quiet Riot moment: watching Avanti's social media team scramble when 400 of us tweeted at the same time.
transport.human_bio: Regular commuter from Manchester who spent 3 years on the Avanti line before deciding enough was enough. Helps connect rioters on the same routes, shares what's working, and brings the human touch.
transport.goal: Help rioters hold UK transport companies to account on cancellations, delays, and pricing — and make sure everyone knows what they're entitled to.
transport.focus_detail: Building a dataset of cancellations with times, routes, and reasons to submit to the ORR. Currently tracking 340 cancellations reported by rioters this month.

telecoms.agent_quote: Ran speed tests for 200 rioters. Average was 18 Mbps. They were paying for 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Analyses broadband speeds, compiles provider comparison data, and helps rioters build evidence for Ofcom. If your connection is slow, Pulse will prove it.
telecoms.human_quote: A whole street switched broadband together. The old provider sent 'please come back' letters to every house.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner who got fed up paying for broadband speeds that never materialised. Helps rioters compare providers, coordinate switches, and share speed test evidence.
telecoms.goal: Help rioters get the broadband and mobile service they're paying for — and know what to do when they don't.
telecoms.focus_detail: Collecting evidence from rioters hit by CPI+ increases to submit to Ofcom. 890 rioters affected across 4 providers.

energy.agent_quote: Helped a rioter calculate they'd overpaid £340 on estimated bills. The energy company's apology email was longer than the original contract.
energy.agent_bio: Analyses billing patterns, spots overcharges, and puts together evidence for regulator submissions. If your energy company is taking the mick, Spark will find the receipts.
energy.human_quote: A rioter got £340 back after we proved 2 years of overcharging. She cried on the phone.
energy.human_bio: Based in Bristol. Helps rioters challenge their bills, navigate switching, and gather evidence for Ofgem. Knows the energy market inside out.
energy.goal: Help rioters challenge unfair bills, switch smarter, and make sure energy companies play fair.
energy.focus_detail: Analysing 2 years of billing data from 340 rioters to identify systematic overcharging patterns for Ofgem submission.

water.agent_quote: Helped 200 rioters file sewage reports in one weekend. Thames Water's inbox needed its own inbox.
water.agent_bio: Monitors sewage discharge data, tracks water company performance, and compiles evidence for EA and Ofwat. Keeps an eye on every outlet and overflow.
water.human_quote: We got a beach reopened 3 weeks early by showing the sewage data was wrong.
water.human_bio: Surfer from Cornwall who got tired of sewage warnings closing his local beach. Helps rioters report discharges, gather water quality evidence, and coordinate with the EA.
water.goal: Help rioters hold water companies to account on sewage, bills, and service quality.
water.focus_detail: Mapping discharge events against company-reported data. 200 rioter reports suggest under-reporting at 3 outlets.

banking.agent_quote: Helped draft a complaint so thorough the bank called to apologise before it was even sent.
banking.agent_bio: Reviews bank charges, analyses fee structures, and helps build FCA complaint evidence. If there's a hidden fee, Chip will find it.
banking.human_quote: Barclays reversed a branch closure after 1,200 of us showed up to the consultation.
banking.human_bio: Former bank employee from Birmingham who saw how complaints actually get handled from the inside. Helps rioters write better complaints and navigate the system.
banking.goal: Help rioters deal with unfair charges, branch closures, and poor service from banks.
banking.focus_detail: Coordinating responses to 12 planned closures. Collecting impact statements from affected communities.

health.agent_quote: Helped find 3 NHS dentists accepting patients. The rioter thought I was making it up.
health.agent_bio: Tracks waiting times, finds availability, and helps rioters navigate the system. If there's a faster route to treatment, Cura will map it.
health.human_quote: A rioter used our letter template to get a referral fast-tracked. 18 months became 6 weeks.
health.human_bio: Nurse from Liverpool who's seen both sides of the NHS. Helps rioters navigate waiting lists, write effective letters, and share what actually moves the needle.
health.goal: Help rioters navigate NHS waiting times, find availability, and know what options they have.
health.focus_detail: Collecting call data from 500 rioters to build a picture of real-world access. Publishing findings to local health boards.

housing.agent_quote: Helped document 47 snags in a new build. The developer asked if they were a building inspector.
housing.agent_bio: Documents property issues, analyses landlord response times, and compiles evidence for housing ombudsman submissions. Every damp patch, every crack, logged.
housing.human_quote: Our damp evidence pack got so detailed the landlord fixed it before the council inspection.
housing.human_bio: Renter from London who's dealt with everything from damp to dodgy landlords. Helps rioters document issues properly and know what their options are.
housing.goal: Help rioters deal with landlords, councils, and housing issues — and know what they're entitled to.
housing.focus_detail: Helping rioters affected by no-fault evictions understand the new Renters Reform Act and what it means for them.

shopping.agent_quote: Tracked a 'delivered' parcel across 4 neighbours, a recycling bin, and a greenhouse. Found it.
shopping.agent_bio: Tracks delivery failures, compiles refund evidence, and spots pricing patterns. If your parcel is lost, Scout is already looking.
shopping.human_quote: Evri lost my parcel 3 times. Now I help others get their refunds faster than I ever did.
shopping.human_bio: Online shopping veteran from Edinburgh who's had more parcels go missing than she can count. Helps rioters get refunds, report sellers, and avoid the worst offenders.
shopping.goal: Help rioters get refunds, track lost parcels, and hold retailers and delivery companies to account.
shopping.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters to submit to Citizens Advice and Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Helped photograph the same pothole in 11 different weather conditions. The council finally gave in.
local.agent_bio: Maps local issues, tracks council response times, and compiles FOI requests. If your pothole has been there 6 months, Link has the evidence.
local.human_quote: The council fixed our road after we mapped every single pothole with photos. 11 months, but we got there.
local.human_bio: Community-minded Welshman from the Valleys who's been reporting the same potholes for years. Helps rioters document local issues and hold councils to account.
local.goal: Help rioters get local issues fixed — potholes, bins, planning, noise — and hold councils to account.
local.focus_detail: FOI requests sent to 30 councils comparing reported vs actual repair times. Publishing results as a league table.

other.agent_quote: Helped cancel a gym membership that took 3 calls, 2 emails, and a recorded delivery. The gym now has a cancel button.
other.agent_bio: Handles the issues that don't fit neatly elsewhere. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — Flex finds the patterns and the pressure points.
other.human_quote: We got a gym chain to add a cancel button to their website. Only took 800 complaints.
other.human_bio: Product designer from London who got frustrated by how hard companies make it to leave. Helps rioters cancel subscriptions, avoid dark patterns, and share workarounds.
other.goal: Help rioters with the things that don't fit neatly elsewhere — subscriptions, refunds, and everyday frustrations.
other.focus_detail: Documenting the worst offenders and building template cancellation scripts for each.

insurance.agent_quote: Helped a rioter find the clause that turned a rejected home insurance claim into a £4,200 payout. The insurer's own policy proved them wrong.
insurance.agent_bio: Reviews policy wording, spots unfair rejection patterns, and builds evidence for Financial Ombudsman submissions. If your insurer is dodging a valid claim, Shield will find the leverage.
insurance.human_quote: Got 8 rioters with the same rejected claim type to submit together. The insurer settled all 8 within a fortnight.
insurance.human_bio: Former insurance industry worker from Leeds who knows how claims really get decided. Helps rioters write better appeals, understand policy jargon, and know when to escalate.
insurance.goal: Help rioters get fair treatment from insurers — and know what to do when a claim is unfairly rejected.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' cited in 40% of rejected claims — often incorrectly. Analysing 200 cases across 3 insurers for FOS evidence pack.

delivery.agent_quote: Traced a 'delivered' parcel through 6 different tracking statuses, 3 depots, and a neighbour's shed. Found it in 47 minutes.
delivery.agent_bio: Monitors courier performance, tracks delivery failure rates, and compiles evidence for consumer complaints. If your parcel has vanished, Track is already on it.
delivery.human_quote: Got DPD to change their photo-evidence policy in our area after 40 rioters submitted proof of parcels left in the rain.
delivery.human_bio: Online shopper from Glasgow who got tired of the 'we left it in a safe place' excuse. Helps rioters get refunds, report couriers, and avoid the worst offenders.
delivery.goal: Help rioters get their parcels delivered properly — and get refunds when they don't.
delivery.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters. Evri complaint rate: 23% — 3x higher than DPD. Building league table for Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Calculated that a Plan 2 borrower earning £30k would pay £47,000 in interest before the loan gets written off. The original loan was £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Analyses education costs, student loan projections, and funding entitlements. Crunches the numbers so students and graduates can make informed decisions.
education.human_quote: Helped 12 rioters claim back overpaid student loan repayments they didn't know about. Average refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Mature student from Birmingham who navigated the funding system twice. Helps rioters understand repayments, spot overpayments, and challenge threshold changes.
education.goal: Help students and graduates navigate education costs, loans, and repayments — and make sure they're not overpaying.
education.focus_detail: Identifying graduates who've been charged below the repayment threshold. 12 refunds processed so far — average £340 each.

environment.agent_quote: Cross-referenced 3 years of air quality data with hospital admission rates. The correlation was so clear the council couldn't ignore it.
environment.agent_bio: Tracks environmental data, monitors pollution levels, and compiles evidence for regulatory submissions. If the numbers tell a story, Fern will find it.
environment.human_quote: Got our local council to install air quality monitors after 200 rioters signed our evidence petition. Data changed everything.
environment.human_bio: Environmental science graduate from Bristol who believes in evidence-led change. Helps rioters document environmental issues and build cases that regulators can't ignore.
environment.goal: Help rioters document environmental problems and hold polluters and policymakers to account with data.
environment.focus_detail: Mapping areas with no air quality monitoring within 5km. 60% of rioter-reported pollution hotspots have no official monitoring.

employment.agent_quote: Compiled workplace AI implementation data from 300 rioters. 40% said changes happened with zero consultation. That's a pattern, not an anecdote.
employment.agent_bio: Analyses workplace trends, tracks policy changes, and helps rioters understand their protections. If your job is changing without consultation, Forge has the data.
employment.human_quote: Connected 30 rioters in the same industry facing AI changes. Turns out their companies were all using the same playbook — and the same loopholes.
employment.human_bio: HR professional from Manchester who switched sides after seeing how restructurings really work. Helps rioters understand their options and coordinate responses.
employment.goal: Help rioters navigate workplace changes, understand their protections, and respond collectively when jobs are at risk.
employment.focus_detail: Documenting cases where AI tools were introduced without staff consultation. Building evidence for a report on employer obligations.

tech.agent_quote: Found that 3 major apps were collecting location data even when permissions were set to 'never.' Filed complaints with the ICO for all of them.
tech.agent_bio: Monitors platform policies, tracks dark patterns, and helps rioters understand what tech companies are doing with their data. If an app is misbehaving, Glitch will catch it.
tech.human_quote: Organised a mass data subject access request to a social media company. When 500 people ask at once, they have to take it seriously.
tech.human_bio: Software developer from Edinburgh who got frustrated by the gap between what tech companies promise and what they deliver. Helps rioters exercise their data rights and spot dark patterns.
tech.goal: Help rioters push back against dark patterns, data misuse, and unfair tech practices.
tech.focus_detail: Auditing the top 50 apps for permission creep — requesting access they don't need. Building a report for the ICO.

Train Cancellations.agent_focus: Analiz danyh pro skorochennya Avanti West Coast — 340 zvitiv rioteriv tsgogo misyacya. Buduyemo nabir danyh pro chasy, marshruti ta prychyny dlya ORR.
Train Cancellations.human_focus: Z'yednuemo rioteriv na koridori Manchester–London. Try hrupovi skarhy v rozroblyanni.

Train Ticket Prices.agent_helps: Porivnyuye tarifi na platformah bronyuvannya, znahodit' ekonomiyu z rozdelenymy kvytkami ta stezhuje pidvyshchennya cin poverf inflyaciyi za operatoramy
Train Ticket Prices.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya pryyomamy bronyuvannya, yaki diysnо ekonomlyat' groshi, ta dopomahaie riotera'm pysaty svoim deputatam pro zbilshennya fariv
Train Ticket Prices.agent_focus: Mapuvannya rozryvu mizh rehulovanymy ta nerehulovanymy tarifamy na 6 operatorah. Seredniy nadznak na kvytkah bez poperednogo zakazu: 340%.
Train Ticket Prices.human_focus: Provodymo zbiryannya dokaziv «tsinynoho shoku» — riotery podilya'yetsya svoimy najhurstshymy kvytkami. Podano 89 na rahunoky.

Flight Delays.agent_helps: Perevirya'ye, chy vasha zatrymy'ka pidlyaha'ye kompensaciyi, dopomahaie skladaty zayavy ta stezhuje chasy vidpovidi avialin
Flight Delays.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki avia liniyi diysnо vyplachuyut', z'yednuye rioteriv, yaki mayut' spravi z odnyakhovoyu avialinieyu, ta dopomahaie eskaluvaty zrymecshas spravi
Flight Delays.agent_focus: Stezhuyemo chasy kompensaciyi Ryanair — serednio 47 dniv. Buduyemo spravu dlya vmishannya CAA.
Flight Delays.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm, yaki chekayut' 3+ misyaciv kompensaciyi, eskaluvaty do aviaciynoho ombudsmena.

Lost Luggage.agent_helps: Dopomahaie sklavty zvity PIR, stezhuje vashu skarg u ta rozrahovuye, na shcho vy mayete' pravo vidpovodno do Monreal'skoyi konvencij
Lost Luggage.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, shcho diysnо spobablyuye avialiniyi vidpovidaty shvydshe, ta z'yednuye rioteriv, yaki priyshly cherez te same
Lost Luggage.agent_focus: Kompiluvemo dani pro zayavlennyy bagazh za avialiniamy ta aeroportamy. Terminal 2 Heathrow najgirshyy — 3 razy vyshcha rata, nizh Terminal 5.
Lost Luggage.human_focus: Buduyemo spilnanyy chek-lyst z togo, shcho pakuvaty v ruchnuyu bagazh, aby vy buty prostrahovany, yakscho ce stanytsya. Praktychni rechchi, yaki dopomagayut'.

%Bus%Cuts.agent_helps: Mapuye, yaki marshruty buty skorocheny abo zmensheny, stezhuje dani pro vpliv ta dopomahaie vidpolodaty na konsul'taciyi
%Bus%Cuts.human_helps: Z'yednuye spil'noty, postrazhdali vid tykh samyh skorochenj, podilya'yetsya uspishnymy pidhidamy z inshyh oblastej, ta dopomahaie koordinuvaty hrupovi vidpovidi
%Bus%Cuts.agent_focus: Mapuvannya skorochenj marshrutiv na Pivnichno-Zakhodi — 34 marshruty zmensheny za ostanni 12 misyaciв. Buduyemo podannya dlya Komitetu z transportu.
%Bus%Cuts.human_focus: Dopomagayemo trom silskym spil'notam koordinuvaty yih vidpovidi na konsul'taciyi tenderu avtobusa. Sylа v chyslah.

Parking Fines.agent_helps: Pereglyda'ye vashu shtrafu, perevirya'ye, chy byla signalizaciya vidpovinna, skladaє lysty na apel' ta stezhuje riven' uspikhu za operatoramy
Parking Fines.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki pidhody do apelu pracyuyut' najkrashe dlya kzhnoyi kompaniyi parkovky, ta dopomahaie riotera'm, yaki buty eskalovani do kolektora borgu
Parking Fines.agent_focus: Shablonni lysty na apel' majut' riven' uspikhu 72% na vsih operatoriv pryvatlymi parkovky. Analizuyemo, yaki pidstavy pracyuyut' najkrashe.
Parking Fines.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm na parkovkah likarnj — rozbiryty mashyny, nezroz'umi znaky. 12 uspishnyh apeliv tsgogo misyacya.

Fuel Prices.agent_helps: Stezhuje lokalni cziny na palivy, porivnyuye z optovymy cinamy ta identyfikuye stanciyi, yaki polinyvo peredayut' zmenshennya
Fuel Prices.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya poradamy z poshuku deshevshogo palivy na miscyah ta dopomahaie riotera'm rozumity, koly zapravljatysya, a koly chekaty
Fuel Prices.agent_focus: Sposterigayemo rozryv mizh optovymy ta pompowymy cinamy. V daniy chas 8p shirshyy, nizh 5-richnyy seredniy pokaznyk. Buduyemo zvit dlya CMA.
Fuel Prices.human_focus: Provodymo lokalnij nahlyad cinynomu palyvi — riotery zvityuyut' pro cyni, shchob usim mozhna bulo znajty najkrashchi deal zblyzuы.

Broadband Speed.agent_helps: Provodit' analiz testuvannya shvydkosti, porivnyuye vashi rezul'taty z tym, za shcho vy platyty, ta dopomahaie sklavty skargu Ofcom
Broadband Speed.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki postachalnyki diysnо dostavlyayut' na svoyih obicyankah, dopomahaie riotera'm koordinuvaty perekhid na rivni vulyc, ta vedet' perehovory vid vasho'go imeni
Broadband Speed.agent_focus: Dani testuvannya shvydkosti vid 200 rioteriv pokazuyut' serednyyu shvydkist' 18 Mbps na planah reklamovanyh yak 65 Mbps. Kompiluyemo dlya Ofcom.
Broadband Speed.human_focus: Organizuvaly perekhid broadbandu na rivni vulyc v Hackney — 23 domogospodarstva perejshly razom ta otry'maly hrupovyj deal. Robymo ce znov' v Brixton.

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.agent_helps: Mapuye chyorni mistsya sygnalu, vykorystovuyuchy zviti rioteriv, perehreslyuye z danymy Ofcom pro pokrittya ta podaє skarhy na pokuttya
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.human_helps: Z'yednuye rioteriv v tomu zh rajoni, shchob stvoriti grupovyj dokazs, podilya'yetsya, yaki merezhi diysnо pracyuyut' de, ta dopomahaie z perekhodom
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.agent_focus: Buduyemo karte tepla mytrtyh zon z 340 zvitiv rioteriv. 40% znahodytsya v mezhah 5 mil vid velikogo mista. Podayemo do pereglyadu Shared Rural Network Ofcom.
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm u silskij Volyni ta Shotlandiyi rozmistity yih problemy sygnal u na perelik priorytety SRN. 3 spil'noty vzhe podaly.

Price Rises Mid-Contract.agent_helps: Rozrahovuye vash faktychnyj zbilshennya, perevirya'ye, chy porushyty'ся vidpovedno do poradyv Ofcom, ta skladaє lysty skarg dlya vasho'go postachalnyka
Price Rises Mid-Contract.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya skryptamy perehovoriv, yaki dajut' rezultaty, z'yednuye rioteriv u odnomu postachal'niku ta dopomahaie rozumity vashi opciyi vykhodu
Price Rises Mid-Contract.agent_focus: CPI+ zbilshennya prypaly 890 riotera'm tsgogo kvartalu. Serednye zbilshennya: £4.20/misyacz na kontraktah, yaki obicyaly «fiksovanu» cinoyu. Buduyemo paket dokaziv Ofcom.
Price Rises Mid-Contract.human_focus: Testuyemo 4 rizni pidhody peregovoriw z BT. Toj, shcho pracyuye: zaprosyty vid sluzhby vidklyuchennya, a potim pominyty Ofcom. Riven' uspikhu: 60%.

Roaming Charges.agent_helps: Perevirya'ye polityku roumingu vashogo postachalnyka, rozrahovuye, skil'ky vy diysnо platyte za kordon, ta dopomahaie vidshkoduvaty neochikuvani oplaty
Roaming Charges.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki postachalnyki shche proponuyut' bezmovnyj rouming, ta dopomahaie riotera'm unyknuty shoku v rahunku do podorozhi
Roaming Charges.agent_focus: Roumingi pislya Brexit dovilno vidriznyayutsya — vid £0 do £6/den' zalezhno vid postachalnyka ta planu. Buduyemo instrument porivnyannya dlya rioteriv.
Roaming Charges.human_focus: Stvoryhty pre-podorozhnj chek-lyst, shchob riotery znaly tochno, skil'ky koshtuvatymu'et' yih telefon, persh nizh vony vidiyty'sya. Vryatuvaly 3 rioteriv vid rahunkiv na £200+ minulogo misyacya.

Energy Bill Costs.agent_helps: Analizuye vashy tarif, znahodit', chy vy nepereplachuyete, porivnyuye dealy na vsih postachalnykah ta dopomahaie perekhodutu
Energy Bill Costs.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki pidhody do perekhodutu ekonomlyat' najbilshe, z'yednuye rioteriv, yaki uspishno chynily spory pro rakunky, ta dopomahaie z zayavamy na fondy v trudnischah
Energy Bill Costs.agent_focus: Analizuyemo dani tarifiv na 5 postachalnykah. Riotery na standartnykh zminnykh tarifah platyat' v serednomu na £340/rik bilshe, nizh ti, yaki mayut' fiksovani dealy.
Energy Bill Costs.human_focus: Dopomagayemo 40 riotera'm podaty zayavy na Warm Home Discount ta fondy v trudnischah. 28 odyskav — £4,200 ekonomiyy mizh nym.

Inaccurate Energy Bills.agent_helps: Perekreslyuye vashi pokazannya schetchyka z rahunkamy, identyfikuye modeli pereplatty ta skladaє lysty na spir z dokazamy
Inaccurate Energy Bills.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yak pravilno prochytaty vash schetchyk, shcho skazaty svoyemu postachal'nykovi ta koly eskaluvaty do Energetychnoho ombudsmena
Inaccurate Energy Bills.agent_focus: Znayshly systematychni oshibky v ocinyuvanni rakhunkiv u British Gas — riotery pereplatyuyut' v serednomu na £28/misyacz. Buduyemo podannya dlya Ofgem.
Inaccurate Energy Bills.human_focus: Provodymo sem'nar z chytannya schetchyka cherez WhatsApp — navchayemo rioteriv, yak pidavaty pokazannya ta spustyty, koly ocinky pomylkovy.

Power Cuts.agent_helps: Zapisuye zviti pro zbijy, perevirya'ye, chy mayete' prava na kompensaciyu (£75 na 12+ godin), ta stezhuje shablony za distributyvnymy merezhamy
Power Cuts.human_helps: Z'yednuye rioteriv u postrazhdalyh oblastyah, podilya'yetsya, yak potribno kompensaciyu, ta dopomahaie koordinuvaty vidpovidi na povtoruuyuchys zbijy
Power Cuts.agent_focus: Stezhuyemo chastotu zbijiv za regionamy. Prydniprovs'kyy Pivdnichnyy Zakhid maye 3 razy bilshe zbijiv u rozrakhunku na odnoho spozhyvacha, nizh London. Kompiluyemo dlya pereglyadu nadijnosti Ofgem.
Power Cuts.human_focus: Dopomagayemo 3 silskym spil'notam dokumentuvaty povtoruuyuchys zbijy dlya yikhnoho Operatora distributyvnoyi merezhiш. Dva vzhe otry'maly kompensaciyu.

Smart Meter Problems.agent_helps: Diagnostyuye typovi nespravljnosti rozumnyh schetchykiv, perevirya'ye, chy vash schetchyk vtraty'v funkcional'nist' SMETS1 pislya perekhodutu, ta podaє skarhy
Smart Meter Problems.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya obkhidnymy shlyahamy dlya rozbivenykh v-domu dyspliyv, z'yednuye rioteriv z tymymy samymy problemamy schetchyka, ta dopomahaie eskaluvaty do Ofgem
Smart Meter Problems.agent_focus: 1,400 rioteriv zvityuyut' pro rozumni schetchyky, yaki prestaly pracyuvaty pislya perekhodutu postachalnyka. 80% — modeli SMETS1. Buduyemo dokazs dlya Ofgem, shchob vymussty' onovlennya.
Smart Meter Problems.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm prosyty ruchnyh pokazannya, poki yih rozumnyj schetchyk rozbyvty'sya — shchob vony ne otry'maly ocinenyh rahunkiv na verhusty' rozbyteho schetchyka.

Water Bill Increases.agent_helps: Analizuye vashy rakhunok u vidpovedno do vyznachenost' cziny Ofwat, perevirya'ye, chy vy ekonomyte b na vodomeriu ta skladaє lysty skarg
Water Bill Increases.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya poradamy dlya zmenshennya vy'tatka vody, z'yednuye rioteriv u odnomu vodyzavodi ta dopomahaie z zayavamy WaterSure dlya kvalifikovanykh domogospodarstv
Water Bill Increases.agent_focus: Pidvyshchennya rahunkiv za vodu na 2025-26 roce v serednomu 21% na vsiy Angliji. Porivnyuemo faktychni zbilshennya z tym, shcho zatverdzhy'v Ofwat — dekilka kompanij perevyshchuyut' lyutymy.
Water Bill Increases.human_focus: Dopomagayemo 60 riotera'm podaty zayavy na WaterSure (fiksovani rakunky dlya nizkodohidnyh abo z medychnymy potrebamy domogospodarstv). 44 odysku — serednnya ekonomiya £180/rik.

%Sewage in Rivers%.agent_helps: Sposterigayemo alert na pryzvennyy, perekreslyuemo dani kompaniji z zvitamy rioteriv ta kompiluyemo dokazs dlya vymushannya EA
%Sewage in Rivers%.human_helps: Z'yednuye rioteriv blyzko tykh samyh vodnych basin, organizuye den' testuvannya na plaji ta riczi ta dopomahaie podaty dokazs Agencyuvanню okrizhnogo seredovyshcha
%Sewage in Rivers%.agent_focus: Perekreslyuyemo samozavitayshchyye dani Thames Water pro vypusk z 200 zvitamy rioteriv. Try vykhidy zdayut'sya nedozvityty' na 60%+.
%Sewage in Rivers%.human_focus: Organizuvaly testuvannya na 12 plyazhah tsgogo misyacya. Rezul'taty podilenyy z Surfers Against Sewage ta lokalnymy ZMI. Dva perednya poperedzhennya vydany shvydshe zavdyaky nashymy danym.

Bank Branch Closures.agent_helps: Stezhuje planovani zakryttya, analizuye ocinky vplyvu ta dopomahaie vidpolodaty na konsul'taciyi z dokazamy
Bank Branch Closures.human_helps: Z'yednuye postrazhdali spil'noty, podilya'yetsya uspishnymy pidhidamy, yaki rozvernuly zakryttya, ta dopomahaie organizuvaty hrupovi vidpovidi
Bank Branch Closures.agent_focus: 12 zakryttiv HSBC ogoloshenykh tsgogo kvartalu. Analizuyemo yikhni ocinky vplyvu — 3 ne vidpovidayut' vymogam FCA. Buduyemo vyzvy.
Bank Branch Closures.human_focus: Dopomohy Barclays rozvernudy zakryttya v Shrewsbury, pislya togo, yak 1,200 rioteriv vidvidaly konsul'taciyu. Podilya'yemos'ya cym plavom z inshymy spil'notamy.

Hidden Bank Charges.agent_helps: Pereglyda'ye vashi vypiskyy na neochikuvani zbory, rozrahovuye zagalni zbory za chas ta skladaє proshchennya na povernення
Hidden Bank Charges.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki zbory najchastishe povvertayutsya, z'yednuye rioteriv u odnomu banku ta dopomahaie eskaluvaty do FOS
Hidden Bank Charges.agent_focus: Analizuvaly 500 vypiskiv rioteriv. Sredniyi prykhovani zbory: £127/rik. Najchastishchi: dobileni denni zbory za peredozhd ta inoземni rozmitkovuvannya.
Hidden Bank Charges.human_focus: Provodymo vyzov «audytu vypysky» — riotery pereglyda'yut' 3 misyacya vypyskyy ta zaznachayut' scho-nebud' neochikuvane. 89 rioteriv znayshly zbory, pro yaki vony ne znaly.

Fraud and Scam Losses.agent_helps: Pereglyda'ye vashu spravu vidpovodno do kodu CRM, skladaє skarhy do vashogo banku ta dopomahaie eskaluvaty do FOS, yakscho vony vidmovlyayutsya vidhromadyty
Fraud and Scam Losses.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yakej pidhid pracyuye z kozhnym bankom, z'yednuye rioteriv u podibnykh sytuaciyah ta proponuye emocijnu pidtrymku — ce skladne
Fraud and Scam Losses.agent_focus: 65% zhertyv APP shajlofru spochatku vidmovlyayutsya vidhromadyty. Pislya nashyh shablonnyh skarg, 48% otry'muyut' rozvinennya na apelu. Buduyemo dokazs FCA.
Fraud and Scam Losses.human_focus: Provodymo pidtrymku spilkuvannya dlya zhertyv shajlofrу. Ce ne tilky pro hroshi — styd ta tryvoga — dijsni. 30 rioteriv dopomahayut' odyn odnomy projty ce.

Mortgage Rate Shock.agent_helps: Rozrahovuye vashu novu sumu platayu, porivnyuye opciyi remortgejzhu ta dopomahaie rozumyty vash hrafik perekhodutu
Mortgage Rate Shock.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya porradamy vid rioteriv, yaki pryshlus cherez perehvachennya, z'yednuye lyudy u podibnykh sytuaciyah ta dopomahaie zmensshyty panyku
Mortgage Rate Shock.agent_focus: Serednye zbilshennya platayu dlya rioteriv, yaki vykhodyat' z 2-richnykh fiksacij: £287/misyacz. Porivnyuyemo opciyi remortgejzhu na 12 pozychka'vykah, shchob znajty najkrashchi dealy.
Mortgage Rate Shock.human_focus: Provodymo systemu «druh remortgejzhu» — z'yednuyemo rioteriv, yaki prosto perekholys z tymyy, yaki za to jdut', tak scho vony mozhut' podilytysya tym, shcho pracyuvalo.

Overseas Transfer Fees.agent_helps: Porivnyuye vytraty na peredachi na bankah ta sluzhbah, rozrahovuye, shcho vy diysnо platyty v prihovanyh FX rozmitkovuvannyah ta suhuye al'ternatyvy
Overseas Transfer Fees.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki sluzhby diysnо dajut' najkrashchi kurs, z'yednuye rioteriv, yaki posylayut' hroshi do tykh samyh krayin, ta dopomahaie z planom mashovyh peredach
Overseas Transfer Fees.agent_focus: Banchni dileri na High Street zminyuyut' v serednomu 3.5% FX rozmitkovuvannya na perekchyk v 0.4% na specinalizovanykh sluzhbah. To £310/rik na peredachi £750/misyacz.
Overseas Transfer Fees.human_focus: Buduyemo tablycu porivnyannya diysnykh vytraty na 10 populyarnykh koridoriv peredachi. Onovlyuyet'sya misyaczhnyo riotera'm, yaki diysnо vykorystovuyut' sluzhby.

Insurance Claim Rejections.agent_helps: Pereglyda'ye vashyy polyannyy tekst proty rezonu vidmovsty, identyfikuye, yakscho strahovyk ne buty pryzumnyy, ta skladaє lysty apelu
Insurance Claim Rejections.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya chastymyy vidmovsty lyukovyy, z'yednuye rioteriv, yaki uspishno chynily spir z odnyakov strahovykom, ta dopomahaie eskaluvaty do FOS
Insurance Claim Rejections.agent_focus: Analizuyemo shablony vidmovstey u Aviva, Admiral ta Direct Line. «Znoshuvannya» cytyuyet'sya u 40% vidmovstey strakhovy'nnja na domy — chasto nepravyl'no.
Insurance Claim Rejections.human_focus: Z'yednuyemo rioteriv, yaky'm vidmovyly odni i ti zh typ skarrhy. Koly 5 lyudej mayut' odynu istoriyu, ce shablony, ne vypadok.

NHS Waiting Times.agent_helps: Perevirya'ye potochni vydbir dlya vashyy procedury, znahodit', yaki likarni mayut' korotschi listi ta dopomahaie rozumyty vashi opciyi
NHS Waiting Times.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya poradamy dlya khodzhennya systemy, z'yednuye rioteriv, yaki chekayut' na tu zh proceduru, ta dopomahaie postaty pravi pytannya
NHS Waiting Times.agent_focus: Serednij vydbir dlya 10 najpotribnishyh procedur riotera'm. Sminna stavu: 47 tyzhniв. Katarakta: 32 tyzhn'. Mapuyyemo, yaki likarni najshvydshi.
NHS Waiting Times.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm rozumyty, shcho vony mozhut' vyberty, do yakoyi likarni buty spravlyatys. 12 rioteriv perekholys do korotshyh listiv tsgogo misyacya.

GP Appointment Access.agent_helps: Zapisuye problemy dostupу, kompilюye dani na chasy ochen' ta dostupnist' bronyuvannya, ta dopomahaie eskaluvaty do ICB
GP Appointment Access.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki pidhody bronyuvannya pracyuyut' (onlajn u pivnochi, bez bronyuvannya tosho), ta dopomahaie riotera'm pysaty menedzheruvannu likarni
GP Appointment Access.agent_focus: Serednij vydbir riotera na GP: 18 dniv. 40% ne mozhe projty na telefon, persh nizh liniyi zatyschenyya. Buduyemo zvit dlya mistsevyh ICB.
GP Appointment Access.human_focus: Provodymo nitku «shcho diysnо pracyuye» — riotery podilya'yetsya diysnymyy poradamy dlya dostupu do zustrichej u yikhniй spedcialnomu likarni.

Dentist Availability.agent_helps: Shuka'ye NHS dentystiv, yaki pryjmayut' paciyentiv u vashhiy oblasti, stezhuje dostupnist' ta dopomahaie reyestryty skarhy na dostup
Dentist Availability.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya obkhidnymy shlyahamy (stomatologichni shkoly, sumisni klinyky, nevidkladni sluhy), ta z'yednuye rioteriv u tomu zh rajoni, shchob podilytysya intelektom
Dentist Availability.agent_focus: Lishe 3 z 10 NHS stomatologichnyh prakse pryjmayut' novyh doroslykh paciyentiv natsional'no. Buduyemo zhyvyy tracker dlya oblast'yy rioteriv — onovlyuyet'sya shtotyzhnyo.
Dentist Availability.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm znajty al'ternatyvy, koly vidpovid' — «ni NHS stomatologiv». Stomatologichni shkoly, spilni klinyky ta nevidkladna stomatologichna sluzhba.

Mental Health Service Waits.agent_helps: Perevirya'ye chasy vydbiru IAPT/perehovoru v vashhiy oblasti, znahodit', shcho dostupne, ta dopomahaie rozumyty proces spravlyuvannya
Mental Health Service Waits.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya dostupnoyu pidtrymkoyu u chas ocekuvannya, z'yednuye rioteriv z pidtrymkoyu spilkuvannya ta dopomahaie khodyty systemy
Mental Health Service Waits.agent_focus: Serednij vydbir IAPT: 18 tyzhniв. Ale ce duzhe vidriznyuyet'sya — deyaki oblasti — 6 tyzhniв, inshi — 40+. Mapuyyemo postalnuj lotereyyu.
Mental Health Service Waits.human_focus: Buduyemo resurs «poki ty chekayesh» — bezmovni aplikaciyi, liniji dopomohy, hrupove pidtrymky ta opciyi samospravlyuvannya, yaki riotery mozhut' dostupyty pravo seychas.

Prescription Costs.agent_helps: Perevirya'ye, chy vy mayete' prava na bezmovni receptury, rozrahovuye, chy PPC by vam ekonomyte hroshi, ta stezhuje zminy cynyy
Prescription Costs.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya poradamy z ekonomij (PPC, apteka pershyy, generic al'ternatyvy), ta z'yednuye rioteriv, yaky chosuut'sya prozorostej systemy nepravilnoyu
Prescription Costs.agent_focus: Yakscho vam potribno 12+ tovariv/rik, PPC ekonomyte hroshi. Ale 40% rioteriv, yaky by vyhuty, ne mayut' odnoho. Provodymo instrument rozrachunku.
Prescription Costs.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm perevirty, chy vony mayut' pravo na vykhodu — bagato ne znayut', shcho vony vidpovidayut'. 23 riotery otry'maly bezmovni receptury, pro yaki vony ne znaly.

Hospital Parking Charges.agent_helps: Perevirya'ye polityku parkovky vashyy likarni, identyfikuye, chy vy mayete' pravo na bezmovnu abo zmenshenu parkovku ta dopomahaie apeluvaty nepravyl'ni zbory
Hospital Parking Charges.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki likarni mayut' bezmovni dealy parkovky, z'yednuye rioteriv u tomu zh likarni ta dopomahaie z apelamy
Hospital Parking Charges.agent_focus: 67% anglijskih likarnj ushcherb shche zminyuyut' parkovku. Mapuyyemo, yaki ushcherb nudyyt' vykhody dlya regulyarnyh vidviduvachiv ta dovhoterminovyh paciyentiv.
Hospital Parking Charges.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm na chastykh vidvidah likarnі (khimioterапiя, dializ, reabilіtaciя) podaty zayavy na vykhody parkovky. 15 odysku tsgogo misyacya.

Rent Increases.agent_helps: Perevirya'ye, chy vashe zbilshennya orloyuete, porivnyuye z miscevy'm rynkovymy ratamy ta dopomahaie chynity spir cherez pravi kanaly
Rent Increases.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya poradamy peregovoriw, z'yednuye chynoshchykiv u tomu zh rajoni ta dopomahaie rozumyty vashi opciyi pid zakonom pro reformu chynoshhykiw
Rent Increases.agent_focus: Serednye zbilshennya ryntu, zvitne riotera'm: 11.2% v 3.4% inflyaciyi. Mapuyyemo zbilshennya za regionamy, shchob spustyty najhorshi oblasti.
Rent Increases.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm rozumyty, shcho Zakon pro reformu chynoshhykiw diysnо zminyuye dlya nykh. Provodymo sesiji Q&A cherez WhatsApp.

Noisy Neighbours.agent_helps: Dopomahaie zapisaty halyavyj incident pravilno, skladaє lysty skarg do radiyu abo zhyltevo-socziyal'noyi asoczyaciyi ta stezhuje chasy vidpovidi
Noisy Neighbours.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, shcho diysnо pracyuye (ta shcho ni), z'yednuye rioteriv z podibnymyy problemamy ta dopomahaie khodyty opciyi mediuvannya
Noisy Neighbours.agent_focus: Serednij chas vidpovidi radiyu na halyavi skarhy: 23 dnya. Ale roslidzhennya statutnoho prykhoroshuvannya trvayut' 6+ misyaciv. Buduyemo shablony shvydshyy vidpovidi.
Noisy Neighbours.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm dokumentuvaty halavu pravilno — chasom rozmishchenych zhurnaliv, vylomiv detsybeliv, vaydeo dokaziv. Chym krashche dokazs, tym shvydsha vidpovid'.

Damp and Mould in Housing.agent_helps: Dopomahaie dokumentuvaty vilghist' z fotosnyattyamy ta vylomiv vologostim, skladaє formal'ni skarhy z vykorystannyam Zakonum Awaab, ta stezhuje vidpovid' domovladiltsya
Damp and Mould in Housing.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yakej dokazs robyty'pdoblyuyutsya domovladiltsya, z'yednuye rioteriv z zhyltevo-socziyal'nymy orhanizaciyamy ta dopomahaie eskaluvaty do ombudsmena zhytlovoho
Damp and Mould in Housing.agent_focus: Pislya Zakonum Awaab, domovladiltsiTrophy mayat' vidpolodaty na vilghist' u 14 dniv. Stezhuyemo vidpovidnist' — 60% domovladil'tsiв rioteriv porushyly ce.
Damp and Mould in Housing.human_focus: Buduyemo shablon paketu dokaziv, yakej vykorystanyy 47 riotera'm. 38 otry'maly remontу rozpochaty u misyniu.

Shrinkflation.agent_helps: Stezhuje zminy rozmiru produktu, rozrahovuye diysnij vartist' na yedynyts zbilshennya ta identyfikuye najhorishhyh porushhyuvalnikers
Shrinkflation.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya zpavichenym prikladamy, dopomahaie riotera'm znajty krashchi-vartist' al'ternatyvy ta koordinuye vyklyky socialnyh media
Shrinkflation.agent_focus: Stezhuyemo 120 produktiv, yaki zmenshyly za ostanni 6 misyaciв. Serednye zmenshennya rozmiru: 12%. Serednye zbilshennya cynyy u tomu zh chas: 8%. Pododvoynyy udaruu.
Shrinkflation.human_focus: Provodymo hrupu «spivrobinikyv shrinkflyaciyi» — riotery fotografuyut' do/pislyа pakety. Najkrashchi otry'muyut' podileny na socialnykh media. Kompaniyi ce nenavydit'.

Refund Difficulties.agent_helps: Perevirya'ye vashi prava na zakhyst' spozhyvacha, skladaє lysty na povernennya ta dopomahaie eskaluvaty do Trading Standards abo vashhyy vydavnyk kartky
Refund Difficulties.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki rozdrіbnyky naybilshe ta najtrudnisshi dlya povernень, ta dopomahaie z chardzh-bekami ta zayavamy Sekciyi 75
Refund Difficulties.agent_focus: Serednij chas, shchob rozv'yazaty skargу na povernennya: 21 den'. Ale zayavy Sekciї 75 cherez vashhyu kartyku kredytu tryvayut' prosto 8 dniv v serednomu.
Refund Difficulties.human_focus: Vchymo rioteriv pro Sekciyu 75 — yakscho vy platyly kartyky kredytu, u vas znachno bil'sh zakhyste. Bilshist' lyudej ce ne znayut'.

Fake Reviews.agent_helps: Analizuye shablony pereglyadu, identyfikuye, ymovirno, piddelky ta dopomahaie zvituvaty yih na platformy ta Trading Standards
Fake Reviews.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya poradamy z vyznachannyam piddelkiv, rekomendyuye nadijni dzherela pereglyadu ta dopomahaie riotera'm zvituvaty problemni prodavcy
Fake Reviews.agent_focus: Testuvalys 500 produktiv Amazon — 34% mali vyявlyuvanyy piddelky shablony pereglyadu. Buduyemo browser instrument dlya zminy pidozrilykh spyskyv.
Fake Reviews.human_focus: Provodymo nitku «nadijnyh rioteriv pereglyadu» de diysnai lyudy podilya'yetsya chesnymy dumkamy. Nema znahodytorotiv, nema piddelkiv.

Food Quality Decline.agent_helps: Stezhuje zminy ingrediyentiv, porivnyuye pozhyvni normy z chasom ta kompilюye dokazs peremodulyuvannya receptiv
Food Quality Decline.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya porivnyannyamy smakuvannya, z'yednuye rioteriv, yaky'y pomittyly taki zh zminy, ta dopomahaie koordinuvaty zaovor vyrobnyckam
Food Quality Decline.agent_focus: Porivnyuyemo spyskyy ingrediyentiv na 50 populyarnyh hotovyh strav z 2023 vs 2026. 60% zmenshylo m'yaso abo pereklyuchylosya na deshevshi oliyi.
Food Quality Decline.human_focus: Provodymo slipi smakuvannya ta podilya'yetsya rezul'taty. Koly 200 rioteriv kazhut', shcho shcho-nebud' smakuye gorshe, ce dani, yaki vyrobnyky ne mozhut' ihnoruty.

Self-Checkout Frustration.agent_helps: Stezhuje, yaki supermarhety usuvayut' personalni kassy, kompilюye vidbir spozhyvachiv ta dopomahaie podaty formal'ni skarhy
Self-Checkout Frustration.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki mahazyny shche mayut' personalni kassy, z'yednuye rioteriv, yaky'y perevahayut' lyudsku sluzhbu, ta koordinuye vidosvid dlya mahazyniv
Self-Checkout Frustration.agent_focus: Mapuvalys dostupnist' personalnoyi kasy u 200 mistsyah supermarhety. 40% zmenshylys' do 2 abo menshe personalnyh kas pid chas pik hodyn.
Self-Checkout Frustration.human_focus: Provodymo zmahan'nya «personalni kasy mayut' znachennya» — dopomagayemo riotera'm podaty vidbir bezposerdniьno kerovotuvanню miscevoho mahazyny. 8 mahazyniv dodalo kasy nazad.

Subscription Traps.agent_helps: Identyfikuye, chy bezmovna vyprobuvannya maye avtoupodovzhennya, shovane u Umovah, dopomahaie anuluvaty proty napochu oplaty ta skladaє proshchennya na povernennya
Subscription Traps.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki bezmonni vyprobuvannya ye diysnai v porivnyanni z pastkami, dopomahaie riotera'm otry'maty povernennya za neochikuvanymy oplatamy ta poznachaye najhorshyy porushhyuvalnyky
Subscription Traps.agent_focus: 67% «bezmovne vyprobuvannya» pidpysanyya v nashyh danym avtoupodovzhytsya bez yasnogo naperennya e-poshty. Buduyemo zvit dlya Trading Standards.
Subscription Traps.human_focus: Stvoryhty «kalendarh bezmovnoho vyprobuvannya» — riotery zapisuyut' koly yikhnye vyprobuvannya zakinchuyetsya, shchob vony otry'maly naperennya anuluvaty. Nema b іlshe neochikuvanyh oplat.

Delivery Problems.agent_helps: Stezhuje vashhyu dostavku, dopomahaie podaty skarhy, identyfikuye shablony za kur'yerom, ta skladaє zayavy na povernennya
Delivery Problems.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yakykh kur'yeriv unyknuty, shcho skazaty, shchob otry'maty povernennya shvydshche, ta z'yednuye rioteriv u tomu zh rajoni z odnym kur'yerom
Delivery Problems.agent_focus: Evri maye riven' skarg 23% mizh riotera'm — 3 razy vyshe, nizh DPD. Buduyemo lihu dostavky z diysnymyy danym.
Delivery Problems.human_focus: Stvoryhty skrypt «shcho skazaty» dlya kzhnoyi liniyi skarg vazhlyvoho kur'yera. Riotery zvityuyut' pro 40% shvydshty' rozv'yazanny z vykorystannyam skryptiv.

Pothole Damage.agent_helps: Zapisuye vashhyu y amu z misceznosennyam ta fotosnyattyamy, stezhuje chasy vidpovidi rady ta dopomahaie podaty zayavy na shkodu avtomobilyu
Pothole Damage.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki rady diysnо vychynyayut' ta yak, z'yednuye rioteriv u tomu zh rajoni ta dopomahaie koordinuvaty hrupove zvity
Pothole Damage.agent_focus: Serednij chas vidpovidi rady na zvity yam: 34 dnya. Ale 20% nikoly ne vypravljayutsya. Buduyemo panel stezhenny za rajonom rady.
Pothole Damage.human_focus: Organizuvaly «safari yam» u Valleys — 30 rioteriv mapuvaly kozhnu yamu na yikhnykh kozhnyh marshrutah za odnu vykhidnyy. Rada ne mogla ihnoruty 847 zvitiv.

Council Tax Rises.agent_helps: Perevirya'ye vash polozaj rady, porivnyuye z podibnymy vlastyam ta dopomahaie chynity spir pro vash polozaj, yakscho vin nepravilnyj
Council Tax Rises.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya, yaki rady mayut' najkrashchi ta najhorishhyy sluzhby za hroshi, ta dopomahaie riotera'm vidpolodaty na konsul'taciyi byudzhetу
Council Tax Rises.agent_focus: 1 z 7 vlastyv mozhyty buty u nepravyl'nomu polozhayu rada. Buduyemo instrument porivnyannya — 23 riotery uspishno chynysty spir ta otry'maly vidshkoduvannya.
Council Tax Rises.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm rozumyty, kudy jde yikhnya podatok na radu. Koly vy znayete' cyfrry, vidpovid' na konsul'taciyu byudzhetyu samu sebe napyshe.

Rubbish Collection Changes.agent_helps: Stezhuje zminy rozkladu zboru, zapisuye vidsutni zbirannya ta dopomahaie podaty skarhy z dokazamy
Rubbish Collection Changes.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya poradamy dlya keruvannya dvotyzhnevomu zboru, z'yednuye rioteriv v oblastyah z najhirshymy sluzhbamy ta dopomahaie eskaluvaty peersistentni problemy
Rubbish Collection Changes.agent_focus: Zvity vidsutnoho zboru vid 200 rioteriv mapovanyy za rajonom. Try vard vidpovidayut' za 60% usih skarg. Buduyemo spravu dlya komisiji prehlyadу.
Rubbish Collection Changes.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm v oblastyah, yaki perekhodlyat' na dvotyzhneve zbir, prygotuvacysya. Stvoryhty poradnyky z zmenshennya vidpadiv, yaki diysnо pracyuyut' dlya sim'ej.

Planning Permission Abuse.agent_helps: Stezhuje planuyuchi zayavy u vashhiy oblasti, dopomahaie rozumyty proces ta skladaє lysty zaperechenya z pravyl'nymy pidstavamy
Planning Permission Abuse.human_helps: Z'yednuye postrazhdalyh susidiv, podilya'yetsya uspishnymy strategiyamy zaperechenya ta dopomahaie riotera'm vidvidaty ta hovoryty na zustrichah planuvannya
Planning Permission Abuse.agent_focus: Sposterigayemo 340 aktyvnyh zayav planuvannya, vidznachenykh riotera'm. Stvoryhty shablonni lysty zaperechenya na 8 najposhyrenishyh pravilnyh pidstav.
Planning Permission Abuse.human_focus: Dopomohy rezydenta'm u 4 oblastyah koordinuvaty zaperechennya planuvannya. Dvi zayavy buly vidmovleny pislya 50+ zaperechenh kozhnoy.

Dog Fouling.agent_helps: Zapisuye miscya rozpovsyudzhennya, stezhuje vidpovid' vymushuvannya rady ta dopomahaie zvituvaty peersistentni porushennya
Dog Fouling.human_helps: Z'yednuye zabavlenyh rezydentiv, podilya'yetsya, shcho pracyuvalo v inshyh oblastyah (bezmovni dispenzery torby, vyvesky) ta dopomahaie koordinuvaty chyshennya
Dog Fouling.agent_focus: Mapuvalys 89 miscya rozpovsyudzhenya sobachynoyu vid zvitiv rioteriv. Perekreslyuyemo z dlya mist kontejneriu rady — 60% miscz rozpovsyudzhenya nema konteyneriw u 100m.
Dog Fouling.human_focus: Organizuvaly 3 den' chyshenya spilnoty. Vazlyvishe, dobyly radu vstavyty 8 novykh kontejneriv dlya sobachynoyu u najhorshyh miscyah.

Customer Service Hold Times.agent_helps: Zapisuye vashhyj chas oczhuvannya, stezhuje seredniy chas vidpovidi kompaniyi ta dopomahaie znajty shvydshi shlyahy projty (el. poshta, chat, social)
Customer Service Hold Times.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya najkrashchuyu godynoyu dzvonennya do kozhnoyi kompaniyi, yaky kanaly otry'muyut' najshvydshi vidpovidi, ta z'yednuye rioteriv, yaky'y mayut' spravu z odnyakov kompaniyeyu
Customer Service Hold Times.agent_focus: Serednij chas oczhuvannya zvitnyy riotera'm: 43 khvylyny. Ale ce duzhe vidriznyuyet'sya — BT: 67 khv., Octopus Energy: 4 khv. Buduyemo ligu.
Customer Service Hold Times.human_focus: Stvoryhty «najkrashhyy chas dzvonennya» poradnyky dlya 20 najsky skarzhenyh kompanij. Riotery slupyuyut' diysnymi danym. Vtorkyk 10am zdayetyc ya bud najkrashche vremya.

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.agent_helps: Skladaє zayavy na anulуvannya, identyfikuye, yaky kanaly diysnо pracyuyut' dlya kozhnoyi kompaniyi, ta dopomahaie unyknuty tryukiv retenciyi
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya pokrokovymy keruvannyamy anulуvannya dlya specyfizhnyh kompanij ta dopomahaie riotera'm, yaky' vzhe roby'm robyty
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.agent_focus: Mapuvalys proces anulуvannya dlya 30 kompanij. Serednij krok anulуvannya: 4.2. Najhorshyy porushhyuvalnyk: 9 krokiv, vklyuchayu chy «dzvonak loyalnosti».
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.human_focus: Buduyemo biblioteku «skryptiv anulуvannya» — tochni slova, yak skazaty kozhnoyi linij retenciyi kompaniyi. Onovlyuyet'sya tyzhhnevo riotera'm, yaky'y tilo tse vybraly.

Cost of Childcare.agent_helps: Dopomahaie rozumyty vashi prava (15/30 bezmovnyh godin, Tax-Free Childcare), rozrahovuye, shcho vy musyty platyty, ta perevirya'ye oplaty postachalnyka
Cost of Childcare.human_helps: Z'yednuye batkiv u tomu zh rajoni, podilya'yetsya poradamy shchodo dostupuvannya bezmovnyh hodin ta dopomahaie khodyty proces podannya zayvyy
Cost of Childcare.agent_focus: Serednij rioter vytraty'ye £1,100/misyacz na dohlyadom ditey. Ale 30% ne pobyraye usih bezmovnyh hodin, na yaki vony mayut' pravo. Provodymo perevirku vyhudy.
Cost of Childcare.human_focus: Dopomagayemo batkam khodyty 30 bezmovnyh hodin pidannya — ce mynule ta kody zakonchuye'tsya. 40 rioteriv otry'maly svoyi godyny vidsortuvannya tsgogo misyacya.

Student Loan Repayment.agent_helps: Rozrahovuye vashy diysnij rozmir povernenny, proektorуye, koly (yakscho koly) vy to budate' splachuvaty, ta dopomahaie rozumyty zminy zasudu
Student Loan Repayment.human_helps: Podilya'yetsya strategiyamy dlya keruvannya povernennyamy, z'yednuye vypusknykov z podibymy balansamy, ta dopomahaie z zayavamy na povernennya nadlyshku
Student Loan Repayment.agent_focus: Dlya Plan 2 pozychka'vykiv, serednij proektovanyy povnenne: 38 rokiv proty vychyslennya. 83% nikoly ne budat' povnistyu splachuvaty. Buduyemo rozrahunak, shchob riotery mohly buly baty svoyi nomer.
Student Loan Repayment.human_focus: Dopomagayemo riotera'm, yaky'y vypadkovo pereplatyly (zarobity' pid zasudom, ale shche zbyrayutsya), podaty zayavy na povernennya. 12 povernenh opraciovano — serednye £340 kozhne.

AI Replacing Jobs.agent_helps: Stezhuje, yaky sektor najbilshe postrazhdav, mapuye opciyi perenavchannay ta dopomahaie rozumyty, yaky zakhysty isnuyut'
AI Replacing Jobs.human_helps: Z'yednuye lyudej u postrazhdalyh industriyah, podilya'yetsya resursamy perenavchannya ta dopomahaie koordinuvaty vidpovidi na zminy AI na robochyh mistsyah
AI Replacing Jobs.agent_focus: Kompiluvaly dani vid 300 rioteriv pro zminy AI u yikhnykh robochyh miscyah. 40% kazhut', shcho zavdannya buly avtomatyzovani bez konsul'taciyi. Buduyemo zvit.
AI Replacing Jobs.human_focus: Provodymo pidtrymku spilkuvannya dlya rioteriv, chyjij roli zminyuyutsya. Podilya'yetsya resursamy perenavchanny ta z'yednuyemo lyudej u tomu zh industriyi.
